data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the states of  Perak  (Hulu Perak, Kuala Kangsar, Kinta, Kampar, Batang Padang and Muallim);  Kelantan  (Tumpat, Pasir Mas, Kota Bharu, Jeli, Tanah Merah, Bachok, Machang, Pasir Puteh and Kuala Krai);  Terengganu  (Besut, Setiu, Kuala Nerus, Kuala Terengganu and Marang);  Pahang  (Cameron Highlands, Lipis, Raub, Jerantut, Bentong, Temerloh, Maran, Bera, Pekan and Rompin);  Selangor  (Hulu Selangor, Gombak and Petaling);  FT Kuala Lumpur ;  Johor  (Mersing and Kota Tinggi); and  Sabah:  West Coast (Ranau), Tawau (Lahad Datu), Sandakan (Telupid, Kinabatangan, Beluran and Sandakan) and Kudat (Kota Marudu and Pitas) until 9:00PM; Wednesday, 1 July 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di negeri  Perak  (Hulu Perak, Kuala Kangsar, Kinta, Kampar, Batang Padang dan Muallim);  Kelantan  (Tumpat, Pasir Mas, Kota Bharu, Jeli, Tanah Merah, Bachok, Machang, Pasir Puteh dan Kuala Krai);  Terengganu  (Besut, Setiu, Kuala Nerus, Kuala Terengganu dan Marang);  Pahang  (Tanah Tinggi Cameron, Lipis, Raub, Jerantut, Bentong, Temerloh, Maran, Bera, Pekan dan Rompin);  Selangor  (Hulu Selangor, Gombak dan Petaling);  WP Kuala Lumpur ;  Johor  (Mersing dan Kota Tinggi); dan  Sabah:  Pantai Barat (Ranau), Tawau (Lahad Datu), Sandakan (Telupid, Kinabatangan, Beluran dan Sandakan) dan Kudat (Kota Marudu dan Pitas) sehingga 9:00 malam; Rabu, 1 Julai 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (Second Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 50-60 kmph with wave height up to 4.5 metres are expected over the waters of Phuket until Thursday, 2 July 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Kedua)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 50-60 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 4.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket sehingga Khamis, 2 Julai 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Perlis & Kedah, East Johor, Pahang, Terengganu, Kelantan and Eastern Sabah, Lahad Datu until 9:00PM; Wednesday, 1 July 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Perlis & Kedah, Johor Timur, Pahang, Terengganu, Kelantan dan Sabah Timur, Lahad Datu sehingga 9:00 malam; Rabu, 1 Julai 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of eastern part of Phuket, Straits of Melaka, Samui, Tioman, Condore, Reef North, Layang-Layang, Palawan, Sulu and Sulawesi until 9:00PM; Wednesday, 1 July 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan timur Phuket, Selat Melaka, Samui, Tioman, Condore, Reef North, Layang-Layang, Palawan, Sulu dan Sulawesi sehingga 9:00 malam; Rabu, 1 Julai 2026.

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (First Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 40-50 kmph with wave height up to 3.5 metres are expected over the waters of Northern Straits of Melaka, Samui, Condore, Reef North and Layang-Layang until Thursday, 2 July 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Pertama)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 40-50 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 3.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Selat Melaka Utara, Samui, Condore, Reef North dan Layang-Layang sehingga Khamis, 2 Julai 2026.

data.text_en: Category:  Tropical Depression Advisory (NN)                  Time of Observation:  14:00, 01 July 2026                  Location:  Latitude 14.1 North and Longitude 116.7 East                  Movement:  West 30 km/h.                  Maximum wind speed:  56 km/h                  Distance from nearest international city:  approximately 270 km Southwest of Santa Cruz, Philippines                  Distance from nearest Malaysian city:  Approximately 801 km Northwest of Kudat.                  Threat to Malaysia:  No significant impact.
data.text_bm: Kategori:  Nasihat Lekukan Tropika (NN)                  Masa Pencerapan:  14:00, 01 Julai 2026                  Kedudukan:  Latitud 14.1 Utara dan Longitud 116.7 Timur                  Pergerakan:  Ke arah Barat dengan kelajuan 30 km/j.                  Kelajuan angin maksimum:  56 km/j                  Jarak dari bandar antarabangsa terdekat:  kira-kira 270 km ke Barat Daya Santa Cruz, Filipina.                  Jarak dari bandar terdekat:  Kira-kira 801 km ke Barat Laut Laut Kudat.                  Kesan terhadap Malaysia:  Tiada kesan signifikan.
